content:
MODULE: cosmos.rag.embeddings
FILE: cosmos/rag/embeddings.py (297 lines)
CATEGORY: rag

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Embeddings - Multi-Model Embedding Support

Supports multiple embedding backends:
- Sentence Transformers (local)
- Ollama embeddings
- OpenAI-compatible APIs

CLASSES:
- EmbeddingResult: Result from embedding operation.
- EmbeddingBackend(ABC): Abstract embedding backend.
  Methods: def dimensions(self) -> int
  Methods: async def embed(self, text: str) -> list[float]
  Methods: async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]
- SentenceTransformerBackend(EmbeddingBackend): Sentence Transformers embedding backend.
  Methods: def dimensions(self) -> int
  Methods: async def embed(self, text: str) -> list[float]
  Methods: async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]
- OllamaEmbeddingBackend(EmbeddingBackend): Ollama embedding backend.
  Methods: def dimensions(self) -> int
  Methods: async def embed(self, text: str) -> list[float]
  Methods: async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]
- EmbeddingManager: Manages embedding generation with caching and fallbacks.

Features:
- LRU cache 
  Methods: def dimensions(self) -> int
  Methods: async def embed(self, text: str, use_cache: bool=True) -> EmbeddingResult
  Methods: async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str], use_cache: bool=True) -> list[EmbeddingResult]
  Methods: def get_embedding_sync(self, text: str) -> list[float]
  Methods: def clear_cache(self)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
